text:
EXPLANATION: This is a well-documented, real 18th-century book found on Gallica (Bibliothèque nationale de France), the Internet Archive, Cambridge University Press, ResearchGate, and AbeBooks, all confirming the exact title, author (Marquis de Condorcet), publisher (Imprimerie Royale), and year (1785). Its absence from modern academic databases (Semantic Scholar, CrossRef, etc.) is expected for an 18th-century monograph.
LINK: https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k1057808s
FOUND_TITLE: Essai sur l'application de l'analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas de Caritat (Marquis de Condorcet)
FOUND_YEAR: 1785
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
